result.summary: OKX exposes a public API surface for trading/institutional integrations and an OAuth-protected MCP/agent integration flow referenced from its llms.txt and detected auth metadata.

okx_oauth_app.label: OKX OAuth app
okx_oauth_app.setup: Use the [Agent Trade Kit](https://www.okx.com/agent-tradekit) and OKX OAuth flow to connect an app to OKX. The detected OAuth metadata shows authorization at [OKX OAuth](https://www.okx.com/account/oauth?flow=code), token exchange at [token endpoint](https://www.okx.com/api/v5/mcp/auth/token), and dynamic client registration at [registration endpoint](https://www.okx.com/api/v5/mcp/auth/register). Request the scopes you need, such as `market:read`, `live:read`, `demo:read`, `live:trade`, `demo:trade`, `live:earn`, `demo:earn`, `live:asset_transfer`, or `demo:asset_transfer`.

client_secret.description: OAuth client secret for the registered app.

surfaces.name: OKX API
surfaces.notes: The corpus confirms an API exists via the OKX API page link, but does not provide machine-readable spec URLs or request-level authentication mechanics.

surfaces.name: OKX MCP auth/token endpoint
surfaces.notes: Detected as part of the OKX MCP/OAuth flow; corpus links Agent Trade Kit, while detected metadata provides OAuth endpoints and scopes. Transport/connect details for a separate MCP server endpoint were not present in the corpus.
